name: cloak-lite
description: Open-source CloakBrowser fingerprint browser management console

scripts.build: npm run clean:build && tsc && mkdir -p dist/renderer dist/resources && cp -r src/renderer/index.html src/renderer/css src/renderer/js dist/renderer/ && cp src/main/preload.cjs dist/main/ && cp resources/tray-icon-Template.png dist/resources/ && cp resources/icon.icns dist/resources/
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run clean:release && electron-builder
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && vitest run -c vitest.config.e2e.ts

author: ahoo
